name: Amaya Vale
backstory: Once a researcher for the Foundry, Amaya now protects its secrets from those who would weaponize them. She sees echoes of the city’s past in every data pulse.

name: Kael Rook
backstory: A former corporate agent, Kael abandoned the Syndicate after discovering their plan to rewrite the city’s memory. He teaches the player to survive in the undercity.

name: Nyx Calder
backstory: Heir to the Syndicate’s data empire, Nyx uses cybernetic influence to hunt those who interfere with the Foundry. He believes control is the only path to order.

name: Mira Wren
backstory: Raised in the undercity, Mira reads the city’s echoes like a song. She helps the player interpret Foundry hints while keeping her own secrets.

name: Echo
backstory: Not a human but a fragment of the Foundry’s memory. Echo appears as visions and data traces, offering guidance that may bend reality.
